parameters.query: SELECT id, name, size, target_agencies, capabilities, threat_score, threat_level, region, govtribe_url, total_obligated, status, scoring_factors, scored_at, created_at, landscape, tags, COALESCE(eis_strategy->>'eis_impact', '') AS eis_strategy, COALESCE(teaming_potential->>'assessment', '') AS teaming_potential, COALESCE(known_contracts::text, '[]') AS known_contracts, relationship, relationship_rationale, why_they_matter, top_agencies, idiq_vehicles, sba_certs, capture_plan_overlap, govtribe_summary FROM gda_competitor_watchlist WHERE status != 'removed' ORDER BY CASE WHEN size = 'Large' THEN 1 WHEN size = 'Mid' THEN 2 WHEN size = 'Small' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, total_obligated DESC NULLS LAST, name

INSERT INTO gda_competitor_watchlist (name, size, target_agencies, capabilities, status, added_reason) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'active', $5) ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET status = 'active', size = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.size, gda_competitor_watchlist.size), updated_at = NOW() RETURNING *
UPDATE gda_competitor_watchlist SET status = 'paused' WHERE name ILIKE $1 RETURNING *

options.systemMessage: You are a competitive intelligence analyst for EIS. Return only valid JSON.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ api_key: $env.GDA_TAVILY_API_KEY, query: $fromAI('query', 'Search query', 'string'), max_results: 7, search_depth: 'basic' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({filters:{keywords:[$fromAI('keywords','Vendor name','string')],time_period:[{start_date:'2023-10-01',end_date:'2025-09-30'}]},fields:['Award ID','Recipient Name','Award Amount','Awarding Agency','Award Type','Description','Start Date','End Date','NAICS Code'],limit:15,page:1,sort:'Award Amount',order:'desc'}) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', action: 'list', competitors: $input.all().map(function(i) { return i.json; }) }) }}

parameters.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_competitor_watchlist (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, size VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'unknown', threat_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0, target_agencies TEXT, capabilities TEXT, status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'active', region TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()); SELECT 'ready';

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: 'You are a competitive intelligence analyst for Georgetown Defense Analytics (GDA). Analyze defense contractors targeting the same federal agencies as GDA: SOCOM, TRADOC, PEO STRI, INSCOM, CYBERCOM, DISA, MDA. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown fences. Cite source URLs for every finding.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt || $json.message || '' }] }) }}
